transcription.text: Clap on, clap off, clap on, clap off, the clapper. Let's you turn things on or off from anywhere in the room. Just plug in the clapper and the television, lamp, stereo, almost anything you want to clap on and off. Clap on, clap off, clap on, clap off, the clapper. Available at Walgreens, Woolworth, Perry, Snyder, Red Alt, and Elliott's Ace Hardware.
